title: rubus pomelii
intro: Rubus pomelii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pomelii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus pomelii can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal teas and supplements.
